cms.name: Godborn
cms.description: Legends speak of powerful adventurers sprung from a god's seed.

cms.name: Ro Blessing
cms.description: Ro's Blessing protected many from a fiery death.

cms.name: Eci Blessing
cms.description: Eci's Blessing protects many from an icy death.

cms.name: Bertoxxulous Blessing
cms.description: Bertoxxulous's Blessing protects from disease and decay

cms.name: Cazic Blessing
cms.description: Blessing from the Faceless can protect one from poison.

cms.name: Karana Blessing
cms.description: Karana's Blessing protects from lightning magic.

cms.name: Marr Blessing
cms.description: Marr's Blessing protects from arcane magic.

cms.name: God Touched
cms.description: God Touched increases all magical resistances.

cms.name: Powerful Mind
cms.description: Powerful mind increases the power pool

cms.name: First Aid
cms.description: Uses a bandage to slightly heal someone.

cms.name: Hold Breath
cms.description: Allows you to hold your breath for a short period of time.
